## What does this PR do?

<!-- One or two sentences. -->

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New tool
- [ ] New model
- [ ] Feature / improvement
- [ ] Docs
- [ ] Chore / refactor

## Checklist

- [ ] `pnpm lint` passes
- [ ] `pnpm typecheck` passes
- [ ] `pnpm test` passes
- [ ] `pnpm build` passes
- [ ] If this adds a tool: registered in `src/config/tools.config.ts` with a `cliAlias`, and tested via both the web app and `pnpm cli <alias> --example`
- [ ] Commit messages follow [Conventional Commits](https://www.conventionalcommits.org)
